summary: R2 fixes the QA P1 drift by removing the UI-local M7_BETA_GUIDANCE_RUNTIME_PACK and projecting the M7 guidance read model from a deterministic generated client fixture copied from the accepted content-source/m7-beta-scenarios/beta-scenario-person-event-set.json. The fixture is mechanically compared to the accepted source in client-core tests, and exact contracted counts plus QA-pointed claim, localization, and review-state values are asserted. No dependency or pnpm-lock.yaml diff was introduced.

tests_run.result: Modified: packages/client-core/src/index.ts, packages/ui/src/index.tsx, tests/client-core-m2-district-list.test.ts, tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts, tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx. Added: packages/client-core/src/m7-beta-guidance-content.ts and this R2 handoff. Known unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains untouched. No pnpm-lock.yaml or package.json diff.

Vitest passed: 1 file, 20 tests. Added drift guard comparing generated M7 fixture to accepted content-source JSON and exact assertions for 3 scenarios, 6 persons, 3 titles, 5 events, 36 localization records, 6 claims, 4 known gaps, HIST-M7-FILL-001-SCOPE INFERRED/HIGH, Forced movement and population-loss review, CULTURE_HUMAN_GATE_REQUIRED, Composite court broker 1531, and LANGUAGE_REVIEW_REQUIRED.
UI SSR Vitest passed: 1 file, 10 tests.
Vite web production build succeeded; existing >500 kB chunk warning remains.
Storybook build succeeded and cleaned .tmp/storybook-static; existing chunk-size and plugin timing warnings remain.

Playwright Chromium passed: 13 tests, including M7 encyclopedia tab assertions for INFERRED, Forced movement and population-loss review, Composite court broker 1531, CULTURE_HUMAN_GATE_REQUIRED, LANGUAGE_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and viewport overflow coverage.
Prettier, ESLint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.

decisions: Removed the compact UI-local M7 guidance pack instead of keeping a second hand-authored source of historical/cultural labels.

Added packages/client-core/src/m7-beta-guidance-content.ts as a deterministic generated client fixture from the accepted content-source JSON, avoiding a new workspace dependency and avoiding pnpm-lock.yaml changes.
Kept the React UI on read-model data only; encyclopedia entries now render accepted source localization/review values such as Forced movement and population-loss review and LANGUAGE_REVIEW_REQUIRED.
Added tests that fail on source/fixture drift, contracted count drift, claim label/confidence drift, localization string drift, reviewState drift, and known-gap count drift.

Preserved the earlier scope correction: no @monsoon/content-runtime dependency, no pnpm-lock.yaml diff, and no expansion into formal content lock acceptance, manual node battle, telemetry, accounts, cloud, server, multiplayer, release, branding, or save migration.
risks: The generated client fixture must be regenerated if the accepted content-source JSON is intentionally changed; the new test will fail until it is mechanically synced.
Large Vite/Storybook chunk warnings remain existing build warnings, not introduced by a new dependency.
Known unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains in the worktree and was not touched.
requested_action: Review the R2 drift fix, generated fixture guard, updated UI read-model rendering, and validation evidence.
